title: Elysium Spa Himalayan Salt (1kg)
features: 100% NATURAL INGREDIENTS: Made from pure, natural mineral salts, these bath salts are a treat for the body. They are free from harsh chemicals, making them a perfect addition to any body skincare routine. Embrace the goodness of nature and give your skin the love it deserves.

STRESS RELIEF IN A BAG: Imagine coming home after a busy day, running a warm bath, and pouring in some Dead Sea Salts. The soothing properties help alleviate stress, allowing you to relax completely. It’s the perfect escape from daily life, creating a calming oasis right at home.

REJUVENATION FOR TIRED MUSCLES: After an intense workout, these magnesium flakes come to the rescue. They soothe and nourish sore muscles, providing much-needed relief. Soaking in a warm bath enriched with these salts helps athletes and fitness lovers recover faster and feel revitalised.

HYDRATION BOOST: Each type of salt has hydrating benefits that help nourish the skin. By adding these bath salts to your routine, you can combat dryness and improve overall skin texture. It’s like giving your skin a big drink of water, leaving it soft and radiant.

QUICK & EASY TO USE: Using these bath salts is a breeze! Simply add a generous scoop to warm running bath water and let the magic happen. Soak for at least 20 minutes to fully absorb the minerals and enjoy a peaceful moment just for you.

VERSATILE MINERAL CHOICES: These bath salts come in three incredible options: Himalayan Bath Salts, Dead Sea Salts, and Magnesium Flakes. Each type has its unique benefits, making it easy to find the perfect fit for any mood or skin need. Whether it’s a foot spa after a long day or a full-body soak, the choice is all yours.

SKIN SOFTENING MAGIC: Himalayan Bath Salts are renowned for their skin-softening properties. As they dissolve in warm water, they gently exfoliate, leaving skin feeling silky smooth and refreshed. Perfect for prepping skin before a special event or just indulging in a bit of pampering.

PERFECT FOR GIFTING: Looking for unique gifts for women’s birthdays? These bath salts are ideal. Beautifully packaged and rich in benefits, they offer a thoughtful way to show someone you care. Surprise a friend or family member with the gift of relaxation and self-care.

CUSTOMISABLE RELAXATION: Mix and match different salts to create a custom spa experience. This versatility allows you to experiment and find what works best for your skin. Enjoy a blend of calming Dead Sea Salts and refreshing Himalayan Salts for an unbeatable soak.

ELEVATE YOUR SELF-CARE ROUTINE: Incorporating Elysium Spa Bath Salts into your skincare routine is a game changer. They transform an ordinary bath into an extraordinary self-care ritual, perfect for anyone looking to indulge in some well-deserved pampering. Embrace the luxury of a spa experience right at home!
description: Product Description Elysium Spa Magnesium Flakes and Himalayan Bath Salts are made from 100% Natural Pure Minerals, which have stood the test of time. Suitable to everyday life, or to soothe after sporting activities such as running, football, Directions Add a generous amount (approximately two handfuls) to warm, running bath water for a wonderfully soothing and relaxing bath. Soak for at least 20 minutes to allow the skin to soften, so the natural minerals can be absorbed. Safety Warning Not For Human Consumption See more
